page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg8ae.64xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 processors. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance delivers 256 physical cores and 256 vCPUs operating at a base clock speed of 3.4 GHz. With a one-to-one mapping of threads to physical cores, the CPU allocation is fully dedicated, eliminating resource contention and virtualization overhead.

The instance is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 6.0 GB of RAM per core. It features a high-speed network interface with a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps. However, the instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. Additionally, there are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this configuration.

Given the massive scale of 256 dedicated physical cores and 1.5 TB of RAM, this instance offers high resource density for enterprise-scale deployments. The absence of hyperthreading ensures predictable, high-performance execution for compute-heavy and memory-intensive tasks. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, high-performance computing simulations, memory-intensive data processing, and enterprise virtualization workloads that require massive parallel processing capabilities without GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg8ae.64xlarge is a high-capacity x86_64 server instance designed for demanding enterprise workloads. Powered by AMD EPYC 9T34 processors running at 3.4 GHz, it features 256 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring zero resource sharing. The hardware configuration includes 1536.0 GB of RAM, yielding 6.0 GB of memory per core, alongside a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, its massive compute and memory footprint makes it highly suitable for large-scale databases, high-performance computing, and intensive parallel processing tasks where predictable, dedicated CPU performance is critical.

tagline: A dedicated 256-core AMD EPYC server with 1.5 TB of RAM and 100 Gbps networking for massive enterprise workloads.
